calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2023 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Borton Petrini LLP's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel As To Defendant American General Construction, Inc.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Borton Petrini LLP's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed using the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AMERICAN GENERAL CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S, Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil.

Off calendar. Mail service on July 28, 2022, is insufficient notice per CCP 1005.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ERIK MILLAN, Esq. of Kramer, Deboer & Keane (Tel: 818-657-0255) for defendants Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. and Philadelphia Indemnity Insurance Company;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION TO BE RELEIVED AS COUNSEL AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN GENERAL CONSTRUCTION, INC.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is denied. The attorney declaration states the motion was served by [US] mail; the proof of service suggests service was via email. More importantly, Box 3(a)(2) is checked, which requires checking either Box 3(b) (1) or (2), but neither of those is checked.

Order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)
